metadata.title:
MIGRANTS Will SOON BREAK


ROCK OR SWING THE SCYTHE

pages.raw_text:
are Of the sort which breed disease
The cutting Of these weeds before
they go to seed would be a sanitary
measure of great benefit.


II believe as punishment" said
Judge Hinkle today, that former
Chief Witherspoons idea of having
the men carry rocks back and forth
is salutary measure and decreases
the vagrancy cases. Yet there are
some objections to that plan as it is
nonproductive.


ITO produce something through Ia
Dor is apt to create discord through
the protests of laboring men who
might be affected.


"There is no doubt that cutting
weeds and cleaning up the city would
be beneficial in more ways than one.
The only objection to this plan is
the eyesore of chain gangs working
in residence districts and in public.
but would certainly prove beneficial
to the city and assuredly reduce the
number of Migrants, who would shur,
this city if such punishment was Of
fered them"


For Ia days in this month there
were AZ vagrancy convictions. About
one-third of this number were given
the privilege of leaving the city. The
vags promise to leave, may be absent
a week and are back again. beggins
or doing petty thievery because they
do not fear the mild punishment OF
being boarded at the city's expense.


In addition to these there are petty
larceny cases against the Migrants
and a long daily list of DRINKS, most
of whom are Migrants. In none of
these cases does the punishment deter
the offenders.


1t is time that the Migrants are
punished in manner which will
drive the hundreds now infesting the
city to some other quarters. Only a
rock pile or a chain gang will do II.
The evil Is growing so rapidly that
stringent measures must be taken at
once.
